data.name: 「秘戏图」
data.detailed_description:
春宫图，又名「秘戏图」、「春宫画」、「春宫儿」、「春画」、「春册」，是描述人类性主题的傳統绘画，在東亞文化圈民間常用作性教育的啟蒙教具。
「秘戏图」一款任何人都可以輕鬆玩的傳統拼圖遊戲。令人驚嘆的氛圍，美妙的音樂，高品質的 Shunga 藝術品，非常適合放鬆。
非常適合在辛苦工作一天或疲憊的遊戲後放鬆。
可能所有階級的男人和女人都喜歡 Shunga。圍繞 shunga 的迷信和習俗也表明了這一點；就像武士攜帶 shunga 被認為是一種抵禦死亡的幸運符一樣，它被認為是在商人倉庫和家庭中防火的保護措施。
如果是數字拼圖，就不需要很大的拼裝空間，一個木框來裝飾拼圖成品，也不必擔心丟掉最後一塊。
您可以在顯示器上拼裝插畫拼圖，隨時查看Shunga現成的插畫。

特點

  • 輕鬆的音樂
  • 坦誠的藝術
  • 在電腦上保存藝術作品的能力
  • 簡單快速的關卡
  • 使用提示
  • 可以用一隻手玩

    使用「秘戏图」 讓自己沉浸在日本傳統色情藝術的世界中。輕鬆的音樂，坦率的藝術和古代日本的氛圍。工作一天后放鬆一下真是太棒了。

  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 6500
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 750
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Shunga Frame
data.detailed_description:
Shunga (春画) is a type of Japanese erotic art typically executed as a kind of ukiyo-e, often in woodblock print format. While rare, there are also extant erotic painted handscrolls which predate ukiyo-e. Translated literally, the Japanese word shunga means picture of spring; "spring" is a common euphemism for sex.
Shunga Frame is a traditional jigsaw puzzle that anyone can easily play. Amazing atmosphere, great music, high quality Shunga artworks, great for relaxing.
Ideal for relaxing after a hard day at work or an exhausting gaming session.
Shunga was probably enjoyed by both men and women of all classes. Superstitions and customs surrounding shunga suggest as much; in the same way that it was considered a lucky charm against death for a samurai to carry shunga, it was considered a protection against fire in merchant warehouses and the home.
If it is a digital puzzle, there is no need for a large assembly space, a wooden frame to decorate the finished puzzle, and worry about losing the last piece.
You can assemble the puzzle on the monitor and view ready-made illustrations of Shunga at any time.

Features

  • Relaxing music
  • Candid arts
  • The ability to save art on the pc
  • Easy and fast levels
  • Use hints
  • Can be played with one hand

    Immerse yourself in the world of traditional Japanese erotic art with Shunga Frame. Relaxing music, candid arts and atmosphere of ancient japan. Awesome for relax after a day at work.
